description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default image and installs Lazarus in a before_script with `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq lazarus`. Define two stages, build and deploy, and add an after_script that runs `make clean; make distclean; cd deb; make clean;` after every job. In the build stage add a `ulm` job that executes `./configure; make ulm;`. Also in the build stage add `ulm_deb` which runs `./configure;` then `cd deb; make;` and publishes any `deb/*.deb` files as artifacts, and a `ulm_doc` job that runs `./configure; make doc`. In the deploy stage add `ulm_dist` that runs `./configure; make dist;` and stores the resulting `dist/*.tar.gz` files as artifacts.
